scripts.lint:architecture: bun run lint:templ-tags && bun run lint:css-apply && bun run lint:imports
scripts.build: bun run lint:architecture && go tool templ generate ./... && bun run vendor:assets && bun run build:css && bun run build:versioned
scripts.verify: bun run build && bun run lint:ui8px && go test ./...
scripts.serve: bun run build:css && bun run build:versioned && bun ./scripts/run-server.mjs
scripts.serve:preset:full: bun run build:css && bun run build:versioned && bun ./scripts/run-server.mjs --preset full
scripts.serve:preset:headless: bun run build:css && bun run build:versioned && bun ./scripts/run-server.mjs --preset headless
scripts.serve:preset:playground: bun run build:css && bun run build:versioned && bun ./scripts/run-server.mjs --preset playground
scripts.serve:preset:offline-json-sql: bun run build:css && bun run build:versioned && bun ./scripts/run-server.mjs --preset offline-json-sql
scripts.serve:preset:ssh-fixtures: bun run build:css && bun run build:versioned && bun ./scripts/run-server.mjs --preset ssh-fixtures
scripts.serve:mode:full: bun run build:css && bun run build:versioned && bun ./scripts/run-server.mjs --runtime full
scripts.serve:mode:admin: bun run build:css && bun run build:versioned && bun ./scripts/run-server.mjs --runtime admin
scripts.serve:mode:headless: bun run build:css && bun run build:versioned && bun ./scripts/run-server.mjs --runtime headless
scripts.serve:mode:playground: bun run build:css && bun run build:versioned && bun ./scripts/run-server.mjs --runtime playground
scripts.serve:mode:conformance: bun run build:css && bun run build:versioned && bun ./scripts/run-server.mjs --runtime conformance
scripts.go: bun run build:css && bun run build:versioned && go run ./cmd/server
